Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Dream of Darkness]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Dream of Darkness technique attacks the heart, mind, and soul as one.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — The Dream of Darkness technique was part of a strategy for the second fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — The Dream of Darkness is a technique that makes an arrow's tip warp like a heat haze.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy has been training her Dream of Darkness again.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — The Dream of Darkness technique is located on the fifth page of the Book of Eternal Night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — The Dream of Darkness technique cannot be used to manually create illusions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy is ordered to use the Dream of Darkness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — The Dream of Darkness is a sphere of shadow.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — Charity's domain of shadows and nightmares is the Dream of Darkness.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Dream of Darkness is a technique used by Mercy that causes nightmares.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
